---
title: "Compare Legislators"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    message: false
    warning: false
    toc: false
---

Select two Iowa legislators to see how often they voted the same way. The **vote agreement rate** is the share of roll call votes where both cast the same vote (Yea or Nay). Absences and Not Voting are excluded.

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(here)

people <- read_csv(
  here("legiscan/files_ga91_derived/people.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  filter(party_id != 0) |>
  select(people_id, name, party, role, district) |>
  mutate(
    filename = paste0(
      if_else(role == "Sen", "sen", "rep"), "-",
      str_replace_all(tolower(name), "[^a-z0-9]+", "-"), "-",
      people_id
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(role, name)

pair_data <- read_rds(here("data/votes/pair_lookup.rds"))

ojs_define(legislators = people, pair_data = pair_data)
```

```{ojs}
// Build a fast O(1) lookup Map — store both orderings so order of selection doesn't matter
pairMap = {
  const m = new Map();
  for (const p of pair_data) {
    m.set(`${p.people_id_a}_${p.people_id_b}`, p);
    m.set(`${p.people_id_b}_${p.people_id_a}`, p);
  }
  return m;
}

// Senators first (alphabetical), then Representatives
all_sorted = [
  ...legislators.filter(d => d.role === "Sen").sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name)),
  ...legislators.filter(d => d.role === "Rep").sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name))
]

viewof leg_a = Inputs.select(all_sorted, {
  label: "Legislator A",
  format: d => `${d.name} (${d.party}-${d.district})`,
  width: 360
})

viewof leg_b = Inputs.select(all_sorted, {
  label: "Legislator B",
  format: d => `${d.name} (${d.party}-${d.district})`,
  width: 360
})

result = {
  if (!leg_a || !leg_b) return { type: "none" };
  if (leg_a.people_id === leg_b.people_id) return { type: "same" };
  const p = pairMap.get(`${leg_a.people_id}_${leg_b.people_id}`);
  return p ? { type: "found", ...p } : { type: "insufficient" };
}

scoreColor = result.type === "found"
  ? (result.similarity >= 0.8 ? "#1565C0"
   : result.similarity >= 0.5 ? "#E65100"
   : "#B71C1C")
  : "#555"

html`<div style="margin-top: 2rem; text-align: center; font-family: sans-serif;">
  ${result.type === "same"
    ? html`<p style="color: #888; margin-top: 1rem;">Select two <em>different</em> legislators.</p>`

    : result.type === "insufficient"
    ? html`<div style="max-width: 520px; margin: 1.5rem auto; padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
                       background: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 6px; color: #555; font-size: 0.95rem;">
        <strong>Not enough shared votes</strong><br><br>
        These two legislators voted together on fewer than 20 roll calls, so a reliable
        similarity score cannot be computed. They may be in different chambers or have
        little overlap in the bills they voted on.
      </div>`

    : result.type === "found"
    ? html`<div>
        <div style="margin-bottom: 0.75rem; font-size: 1rem;">
          <a href="${leg_a.filename}.html" style="font-weight: 600;">${leg_a.name}</a>
          <span style="color: #aaa; margin: 0 0.6rem;">vs.</span>
          <a href="${leg_b.filename}.html" style="font-weight: 600;">${leg_b.name}</a>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size: 5rem; font-weight: 800; color: ${scoreColor}; line-height: 1.1; margin: 0.25rem 0;">
          ${(result.similarity * 100).toFixed(1)}%
        </div>
        <div style="color: #888; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 1.75rem;">vote agreement rate</div>
        <table style="margin: auto; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.95rem; min-width: 280px;">
          <tbody>
            <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;">
              <td style="padding: 8px 20px; color: #555; text-align: left;">Roll calls both voted on</td>
              <td style="padding: 8px 20px; font-weight: 600; text-align: right;">${result.n_shared.toLocaleString()}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;">
              <td style="padding: 8px 20px; color: #555; text-align: left;">Voted the same</td>
              <td style="padding: 8px 20px; font-weight: 600; text-align: right;">${result.n_agree.toLocaleString()}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td style="padding: 8px 20px; color: #555; text-align: left;">Voted differently</td>
              <td style="padding: 8px 20px; font-weight: 600; text-align: right;">${result.n_disagree.toLocaleString()}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
        <div style="margin-top: 1.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #bbb;">
          Based on 91st General Assembly floor votes &bull; Minimum 20 shared votes required
        </div>
      </div>`

    : ""
  }
</div>`
```
